blocks.text: Ending the day with the name of Allah brings peace and protection throughout the night.

blocks.translation: In Your name, O Allah, I die and I live.

blocks.text: Reciting Ayatul Kursi before sleep ensures protection from Allah, and no shaitan will come near you until the morning.
It is also Sunnah to recite the last three Surahs of the Quran (Al-Ikhlas, Al-Falaq, An-Nas) and wipe over your body before sleeping.
